emails.subject: UA4 - 1998
emails.body: UA4 1998 Daren: We are currently working to clear some UA4 issues for 1998. I am looking for a valid contract for meter 8740. Meter 8740 Deal 307062 Current K# 089-41500-102 Volume 188.252 Month Sept. 1998 Our deadline is Tuesday, Jan. 18. Please advise which contract this volume belongs on. Thanks. Aimee

emails.subject: UA4 - 1998

emails.subject: Re: UA4 - 1998
emails.body: Re: UA4 1998 Aimee, If you review that deal in CPR, you can see that this is a desk to desk deal on ECT. This is actually our transport of Waha gas on PGE, delivered into HPL. So, the volume should be scheduled/allocated to the ECT intrastate contract 012-27049-201. D Aimee Lannou 01/11/2000 09:36 AM
